lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another banner?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I'm the eldest of the Gnome children and master of tasks for the Western Provinces Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Achievement Diary?

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Western Provinces it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement diary.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Well, there are four different Western banners, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: know more about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Easy rewards please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Western Diary, you have a 25% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 25 free ogre arrows every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Medium rewards please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: In addition to the easy rewards, the Crystal saw will last for twice as long before reverting to seed, you have a 50% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 50 free ogre

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: arrows every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Hard rewards please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, Ilfeen of the Elves can enchant your crystal seed into a Halberd, a locked door under Ape Atoll becomes unlocked, The Void Knights can upgrade your Void armour, the

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Hunter master in the Feldip hills will allow you to hunt in his private hunting ground, teleport crystals can now hold 5 charges, Rantz will provide you with 100 ogre arrows every day and the banner will teleport you to

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Piscatoris once per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about the Elite rewards please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, two Chompy birds will always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, Nieve will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: you with 150 free ogre arrows every day. The banner will teleport you to Piscatoris as much as you desire and you may resurrect once per day while battling Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, two Chompy birds will always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, Steve will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: you with 150 free ogre arrows every day. The banner will teleport you to Piscatoris as much as you desire and you may resurrect once per day while battling Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I claim the rewards?

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Just complete the tasks in the Western provinces so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Goodbye adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the easy tasks in my Western Achievement Diary!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: This banner is a symbol of your exploration of the Western Provinces. You now have a 25% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will provide you with 25 free ogre arrows every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: If you ever lose your banner, come back to me to reclaim it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the medium tasks in my Western achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You need to complete all of the easy too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. The Crystal saw will now last for twice as long before reverting to seed, you now have a 50% chance of 2 Chompy birds appearing when hunting and Rantz will

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: provide you with 50 free ogre arrows every day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the hard tasks in my Western achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. Ilfeen of the Elves can now enchant your crystal seed into a Halberd, a locked door under Ape Atoll has been unlocked, The Void Knights can now upgrade your

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: Void armour, the Hunter master in the Feldip hills will allow you to hunt in his private hunting ground, teleport crystals can now hold 5 charges, Rantz will provide you with 100 ogre arrows every day and the banner will

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: teleport you to Piscatoris once per day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've completed all of the elite tasks in my Western achievement diary!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Western Provinces! Here's your reward!

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: I've upgraded your Western banner for you. Two Chompy birds will now always appear and they have a chance of dropping a pet, [Nieve/Steve] will reward your slayer assignments with more points and Rantz will provide

lines.speaker: Elder Gnome child
lines.text: you with 150 free ogre arrows every day. The banner will teleport you to Piscatoris as much as you desire and you may resurrect once per day while battling Zulrah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, thanks!
